vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 4 of #845 triage v1: bulk filter operations + pre-swarm freshness gate. Owner: Agent A4 (wave 3, depends on A3 actions).

plan.title: feat(scripts,tasks): triage bulk ops + pre-swarm freshness gate

narratives.Problem: Per-issue triage is too slow for ~200-issue corpora. Need bulk ops with filter flags. Separately, swarm Phase 0 currently reads `vbrief/active/` without reconciling against upstream — drift can sneak in. Need a pre-swarm freshness gate.
narratives.Overview: Implement `scripts/triage_bulk.py` exposing `triage:bulk-accept|bulk-reject|bulk-defer|bulk-needs-ac` with --label, --author, --age-days, --cluster filter flags. Implement `scripts/triage_refresh.py` exposing `triage:refresh-active`: refreshes cache for all issues referenced by `vbrief/active/*.vbrief.json` and surfaces drifted items with a three-way prompt (proceed-with-stale / refresh-and-update-local / defer-from-this-batch).
narratives.Constraint: Bulk ops MUST loop through Story 3 single-issue actions (no parallel surface). Filter flags MUST be combinable (AND semantics). Freshness gate MUST be safe under empty `vbrief/active/`. Drift detection compares cached `updatedAt` to live `gh issue view <N> --json updatedAt`.
narratives.Outcome: Tests cover: bulk-* with each filter flag; combined filters; freshness gate detects drift; freshness gate three-way prompt logic (mock user input).
narratives.Test: pytest tests/test_triage_bulk.py + tests/test_triage_refresh.py covering: (1) bulk-accept with --label fixture; (2) combined --label --age-days filters; (3) zero-match returns clean exit; (4) freshness gate empty active is no-op; (5) freshness gate single-drift surfaces three-way prompt; (6) freshness gate proceed-with-stale records audit annotation.
narratives.Action: Implement scripts/triage_bulk.py and scripts/triage_refresh.py. Wire tasks/triage-bulk.yml STANDALONE fragment exposing both bulk:* and refresh:* targets. Imports Story 3 actions.

items.title: scripts/triage_bulk.py implements 4 bulk-* actions with combinable filter flags
scripts/triage_refresh.py implements freshness gate with three-way prompt on drift
tests/test_triage_bulk.py + tests/test_triage_refresh.py cover all 6 cases per Test narrative
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry: feat(triage): bulk ops + freshness gate (#845 Story 4)

references.title: Issue #868: lock-comment protocol (consumes this story's freshness primitive)
Epic vBRIEF for #845 (related-plan; planRef captures parent semantic)
